caseGroup.title: Success cases
caseGroup.description: Examples that help users recognise familiar situations before they act.

guideGroup.title: Next-step guides
guideGroup.description: Structured guidance for what to do first, what evidence to keep, and when to escalate.

caseCards.title: I clicked a delivery text link but did not enter my details
caseCards.description: See how the site should reassure the user, explain likely risk, and suggest monitoring steps.

caseCards.title: The shop refused a refund for a faulty appliance
caseCards.description: A practical example of how to separate store policy from consumer guarantees.

caseCards.title: My landlord deducted bond money for cleaning
caseCards.description: A tenancy example focused on evidence, reasonableness, and how to challenge deductions.

guideCards.title: Understand what kind of problem this is
guideCards.description: A short decision guide that turns the user's story into a category, risk level, and likely next path.

guideCards.title: Prepare your evidence before contacting anyone
guideCards.description: Tell users what to gather first: receipts, screenshots, photos, contracts, and message history.

guideCards.title: Know when to escalate
guideCards.description: Explain when self-resolution is enough and when the user should move to formal complaints or official help.
